message:
🐛 Fix watchdog reconnect overlay: remove clutter, fix stuck behavior (#2254)

- Remove countdown number from spinner circle (keep spinning ring)
- Remove attempt count and elapsed time from status text
- Add force-reload after 60s to recover from stale connections/pod restarts
- Add fallback HEAD check on root URL to detect backend recovery
  when watchdog health endpoint is unreachable (e.g., pod restart)
- Simplify status messages to just "Checking connection…" / "Waiting for backend…"

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
